response.justification: While Bogdan is an accomplished software engineer with 20 years of experience and demonstrable staff-level seniority, he does not meet the core requirement of 8+ years building production-grade AI solutions. His AI experience appears limited to a recent role at re:cinq (started April 2025) focused on MCP tooling and agentic frameworks, rather than end-to-end AI system design and deployment. Critical gaps include no mentioned Python expertise (primary for the role), no demonstrated experience with RAG architectures or vector databases, and limited evidence of designing AI systems on cloud platforms. His background is strong in general software craftsmanship but lacks the specialized GenAI domain depth required for a staff forward-deployed role.
strengths: 20 years of proven software engineering excellence across multiple domains (web, mobile, embedded) with staff-level track record and mentoring experience
Strong TypeScript proficiency and recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure, MCP code generators, and agentic workflows at re:cinq
Bachelor's degree in Computer Science from ETH Zürich; demonstrated ability to lead technical knowledge-sharing through workshops and public speaking
concerns: Does not meet the 8+ years production AI solutions requirement; AI experience appears limited to ~2 months of current role focused on infrastructure rather than end-to-end system design
Python is not listed among core skills despite being primary language for the role; resume emphasizes TypeScript, D, Java, and C++ instead

No demonstrated experience with critical GenAI technologies: RAG architectures, vector databases, LLM performance metrics, multi-agent frameworks (LangGraph, CrewAI), or data pipelines for unstructured data
